install.windows_download: Open https://openai.com/codex/ in the browser, click the Windows download. Saves to %USERPROFILE%\Downloads by default.
install.macos_download: Open https://openai.com/codex/ in the browser, click the macOS download (.dmg). Saves to ~/Downloads by default.
install.linux: Not supported. Codex Desktop is Windows / macOS only.
install.note: This is a GUI desktop application (Microsoft Store / MSIX on Windows). Always tell the user the download location and ask them to follow the install wizard themselves.

install_flow.summary: Download installer → user double-clicks → user clicks through the install wizard
agent_steps: Windows: prefer `winget install --id OpenAI.Codex` if winget is available.
macOS / Windows manual: download installer to ~/Downloads (or %USERPROFILE%\Downloads).
After download finishes, tell the user the EXACT file path.
Tell the user: 'Codex 安装向导已打开,请按向导点击下一步完成安装。' / 'Codex installer opened — follow the wizard to finish.'
Do NOT try to automate the GUI wizard.
tell_user: That they should click through the wizard themselves

identity_guard.description: Codex Desktop is OpenAI's GUI app for the Codex coding agent. It is DIFFERENT from the Codex CLI (`@openai/codex`). Both can coexist — the desktop app shares config under `~/.codex` with the CLI.
